case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. SUN JEONG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL STREET, APARTMENT #502, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $69.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN
FILING FEE PAID FOR DECLARATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT JEONG, SUN ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO
ORDER VACATING NUNC PRO TUNC DEFLT AND DEFLT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT SUN JEONG
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED NOV-19-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEONG, SUN SIM, SOO
